goal: Use the smallest set of new pilot tasks necessary to close the evidence gaps identified in iter_001 review/reflection.
gating_rules: Do not run cand_seed_spotcheck until shared_runtime_probe confirms an explicit runtime path and cand_bucket_pilot emits valid bucket labels.
Do not run cand_min_controller_probe unless canonical_asset_manifest.json exists and the observer-controller split still lacks a clean empirical illustration.
If runtime metadata cannot be collected cleanly, reduce paper claims instead of inventing a new comparison.

cand_protocol: runtime_fairness_appendix_inputs.json or equivalent fields are available
cand_bucket: aggregate GSM8K gain can be decomposed into fixed/harmed/no-effect counts
cand_min_controller: Only considered successful if it sharpens the observer-controller split without becoming a new hero method

notes: Pilot tasks keep the candidate pool alive, but the intended collapse direction is already protocol-first diagnostic paper plus bucket-mechanism support.
Batch size must be auto-detected and maximized before any runtime-sensitive comparison.
Flash attention should be attempted first; any fallback must be logged into the manifest.
